text: Selamat petang Pusat Bantuan Makan Sini saya Siti Boleh saya bantu encik
Hello Siti saya nak tanya pasal pesanan saya tadi Saya baru perasan ada barang yang tertinggal dalam plastik ni
Minta maaf atas kesulitan tersebut encik Boleh saya dapatkan nombor pesanan encik untuk saya buat semakan dalam sistem
Nombor dia M S lapan lapan dua satu Saya pesan set nasi lemak ayam berempah dengan air sirap tapi ayamnya tak ada
Saya faham perasaan encik saya pun akan kecewa kalau jadi macam ni Berdasarkan rekod pesanan encik memang sepatutnya ada ayam
Kalau boleh saya nak refund sajalah sebab saya dah lapar sangat ni kena beli makanan lain pula nanti
Baiklah saya akan uruskan proses bayaran balik serta merta Proses ini akan mengambil masa dalam dua puluh empat jam
Okaylah kalau macam tu Harap lepas ni pihak restoran lebih peka lah ya jangan cuai sangat bungkus makanan
Betul encik kami akan hantar maklum balas tegas kepada pihak restoran Ada apa apa lagi yang boleh saya bantu
Thank you for calling Silver Lining Insurance My name is Marcus To whom do I have the pleasure of speaking today
Hi Marcus this is Sarah Jenkins I am calling because a rock hit my windshield on the highway this morning
I am sorry to hear that Sarah I am glad you are safe Do you have your policy number handy
Yes just a second it is four four nine two zero Alpha I am really worried because I have a long road trip
I understand the urgency Looking at your Premier Plan you are fully covered for glass repair with a zero dollar deductible
Oh that would be a huge relief Does it matter that I am at my office and not at home
Not at all We just need the vehicle location and a contact number Shall I proceed with the booking for the two PM slot
Yes please That works perfectly for me Thank you so much for making this easy
It is my pleasure Sarah I am processing that now You will receive a confirmation text shortly Is there anything else I can assist with
Yeah what do you want this is billing
Hi I am calling because my bill is twice as high this month and I do not understand why
Look it is probably because you went over your data limit happens all the time
But I have an unlimited data plan I checked my contract before calling
Obviously you do not or you would not be charged do you have your account number or are we just going to guess
Wow okay there is no need to be rude my account number is five five four three two one
I am not being rude I am just busy alright pulling it up now
I definitely did not buy any movies I was out of town all of last week
Well somebody in your house did the system does not lie so you have to pay it
I want to speak to your supervisor right now
Fine whatever hold on and do not hang up because I am not calling you back
Selamat pagi Bank Harapan dengan saya Amirul boleh saya bantu encik
Aku nak tahu kenapa ada tolak duit dari akaun aku seratus ringgit korang ni pandai pandai je tolak duit orang
Harap bersabar encik saya minta maaf atas kesulitan ini boleh saya dapatkan nombor kad pengenalan untuk semakan
Nak nombor kad pengenalan buat apa check je la nama aku Johan aku dah call banyak kali takkan takde rekod
Maaf encik Johan prosedur keselamatan bank memerlukan nombor kad pengenalan untuk kami buka profil encik
lapan sembilan kosong dua satu empat kosong satu lima lima tiga tiga
Baik encik saya nampak ada penolakan seratus ringgit untuk caj tahunan kad kredit encik
Caj tahunan apa benda pula aku dah guna kad ni lima tahun tak pernah ada caj tahunan korang ni nak menipu ke
Saya faham kekecewaan encik saya boleh bantu hantar permohonan untuk membatalkan caj tersebut
Tak payah nak hantar permohonan sangat kau cancel je terus sekarang kalau tak aku tutup akaun hari ni jugak
Baiklah encik saya akan sambungkan panggilan ini kepada pegawai atasan saya mohon tunggu sebentar
Thank you for calling ConnectNet technical support my name is Alex how can I help you today
My internet is down again this is the third time this week and I am sick of it
I apologize for the inconvenience let me pull up your account can I get your account number
Are you kidding me I just typed it into the automated system why do I have to repeat it to you
I understand your frustration sometimes the system does not pass the information over I just need it to access your router
Fine it is nine eight seven six five four three hurry up I work from home and I am losing money
I am seeing a line error in your area our technicians are already working on a node nearby
I do not care about nodes I care about when I can get back online give me a time
The estimated time of resolution is within the next two hours
Two hours I have a meeting in twenty minutes this is unacceptable
I sincerely apologize we can offer you a credit for the days you experienced outages
Keep your stupid five dollar credit I want a manager right now
I can certainly transfer you to a supervisor please hold on the line
If you put me on hold I am canceling my service today I swear
I am transferring you now please stay on the line
Hello hah nak apa call khidmat pelanggan ni
Selamat pagi saya nak tanya pasal barang saya dah dua minggu tak sampai status tulis dah hantar
Dah tu kalau status tulis dah hantar maknanya dah hantar la takkan tu pun nak kena ajar
Masalahnya saya tak terima apa apa pun barang tu mahal kot boleh tak tolong semak
Bagilah nombor tracking tu nak semak macam mana kalau nombor pun tak bagi aduhai
Nombor dia T R sembilan sembilan lapan lapan awak ni tak boleh ke cakap elok elok sikit saya pelanggan tau
Saya tengah banyak kerja ni encik bukan encik sorang je pelanggan saya okey kejap saya tengok
Hah ni sistem cakap courier dah letak atas pagar rumah encik pergi la cari kat luar tu
Saya dah cari satu rumah tak ada pun entah entah dia hantar salah rumah ke apa
Mana lah saya tahu saya duduk pejabat bukan saya yang hantar barang tu pergi call courier tu sendiri
Kan ni platform tempat saya beli barang kenapa pula saya yang kena call courier awak lah yang kena uruskan
Eh encik tanggungjawab kitorang sampai barang tu keluar gudang je lepas tu pandai pandai la courier
Ini tak masuk akal saya nak buat aduan pasal servis awak bagi saya nama penuh awak sekarang
Buatlah aduan ingat saya takut ke nama saya Rizal ada apa apa lagi nak marah marah ni
Kurang ajar betul saya nak cakap dengan pengurus awak saya tak nak berurusan dengan orang macam awak
Pengurus tak ada dia sibuk nak tunggu tunggu lah tak nak tunggu letak je telefon tu
Biadap betul punya perkhidmatan pelanggan
Yelah yelah bye
